creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
> Is this x86? cross compiling?
It is amd64, not cross compiling.

> New system svn revision? Base sys rev?
Ports tree revision is 522170 (head).
Src revision is 356358.

> Do you normally test build ports this way?
Yes, I normally build ports this way: I have 430 ports installed that way on my system right now.

> Does it work if you build in the base system /usr/ports?
The build fails if I build in the base system /usr/ports, i.e. if I set WRKDIRPREFIX=
I also tried to build with __MAKE_CONF=/dev/null and the build still fails with the same error.

Thanks for working on it.
